heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 8244 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary through fiscal year ending , to carry out the purposes of this part not to exceed $100,000,000. Funds so appropriated may be transferred by the Secretary to any Federal agency to the extent necessary to carry out the purposes of .September 30, 1980section 8243(a)(3) of this title
